content:
FINAL IVX IA CLOSEOUT — END TO END PRODUCTION

MODE: OWNER APPROVED
ACTION: EXECUTE, FIX, DEPLOY, VERIFY
NO PLANNING REPORTS
NO FAKE PROOF
NO DEMO DATA
NO VERIFIED + BLOCKED CONTRADICTION

CURRENT ISSUES TO CLOSE:
1. 25 TypeScript errors still visible.
2. IVX IA must be verified as Senior Developer in Owner Chat.
3. Public AI and Owner AI must answer without blocking normal questions.
4. Protected routes must return 401 AUTH_REQUIRED, not 500.
5. No hardcoded secrets or tokens anywhere.
6. Production data must be real only.
7. Money, wallet, withdrawal, wire, ledger, KYC, admin, and investor workflows must be verified live.

EXECUTE NOW:

1. Fix all TypeScript errors.
2. Run full typecheck.
3. Run full test suite.
4. Audit hardcoded secrets.
5. Remove any secrets from logs/proof files.
6. Verify GitHub token is not printed.
7. Verify Render key is not printed.
8. Verify Supabase keys are not printed.
9. Verify IVX IA conversation brain:
   - Name
   - Owner
   - IVX Holdings
   - Investments
   - Deals
   - General questions
   - Math
   - Capabilities
10. Verify Owner AI.
11. Verify Public AI.
12. Verify Owner Chat Senior Developer execution:
   - inspect files
   - identify root cause
   - change code
   - run tests
   - push GitHub
   - deploy Render
   - verify live
   - save proof ledger
13. Verify production records only:
   - no fake members
   - no demo investors
   - no proof users
   - no test wallets
   - no placeholder deals
14. Verify full business modules:
   - Registration
   - Login
   - Password reset
   - Email verification
   - SMS verification
   - Members
   - Investors
   - Buyers
   - JV Deals
   - Private Lenders
   - Tokenized Investments
   - Wallet
   - Treasury
   - Immutable Ledger
   - Withdrawals
   - Wire Transfers
   - KYC
   - Notifications
   - Owner Dashboard
   - Admin
   - Analytics
   - Variables
15. Verify money protection:
   - no delete with funds
   - archive instead of delete
   - restore
   - freeze
   - suspend
   - two-person withdrawal approval
   - immutable audit trail
16. Verify landing page:
   - no jumping
   - no layout shift
   - no fake counts
   - real deals only
   - registration works
17. Verify platforms:
   - Android
   - iOS
   - Web
18. Push final code to GitHub main.
19. Deploy production.
20. Verify live endpoints:
   - /health
   - /version
   - /api/public/chat
   - /api/ivx/members
   - /api/ivx/members/count
   - /api/ivx/protection/*
   - /api/ivx/treasury/*
   - /api/ivx/owner-ai
   - /api/ivx/senior-developer/status
   - /api/ivx/owner-variables/status

FINAL RESPONSE FORMAT ONLY:

STATE:
ROOT_CAUSE:
FILES_CHANGED:
TYPESCRIPT_STATUS:
TESTS_RUN:
SECRET_SCAN_STATUS:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
OWNER_AI_STATUS:
PUBLIC_AI_STATUS:
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_STATUS:
PROOF_LEDGER_STATUS:
REAL_DATA_STATUS:
MEMBERS_COUNT:
INVESTORS_COUNT:
BUYERS_COUNT:
JV_DEALS_COUNT:
PRIVATE_LENDERS_COUNT:
TOKENIZED_COUNT:
WALLET_STATUS:
TREASURY_STATUS:
LEDGER_STATUS:
WITHDRAWAL_STATUS:
WIRE_STATUS:
KYC_STATUS:
OWNER_ADMIN_STATUS:
LANDING_STATUS:
ANDROID_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
WEB_STATUS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULES:
If TypeScript errors remain, FINAL_STATUS = BLOCKED.
If fake/demo/test data remains, FINAL_STATUS = BLOCKED.
If money workflows are not verified live, FINAL_STATUS = BLOCKED.
If Senior Developer cannot execute end-to-end with proof ledger, FINAL_STATUS = BLOCKED.
Only use FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED when every item above is live, tested, deployed, and proven.
